reuse_metadata.native_query_output_buffer_reuse_note: prepared_device_count mode reuses native OptiX device query/output buffers and returns only a scalar flagged-group count to Python; native host code still downloads compact group flags internally, so no true zero-copy claim is made

warmup_protocol.minimum_default: 7 repeats with 2 warmup rows for local evidence
warmup_protocol.rule: drop the first warmup_count rows; report medians over remaining tail rows
